basic_details.job_title: UP Police SI Result 2026 OUT (Direct Link) - Download Scorecard @ uppbpb.gov.in
basic_details.short_information: Quick Summary: Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) has released UP Police SI Result 2026 on 7th May 2026 at official portal uppbpb.gov.in. A total of 12,333 candidates have been shortlisted for Document Verification (DV) & Physical Standard Test (PST). Candidates can check the merit list PDF using Roll Number.

important_instructions: ✓ Download and print the merit list PDF ✓ Keep original documents ready for DV ✓ Prepare for Physical Standard Test (PST) & Physical Efficiency Test (PET) ✓ Regularly check official website for DV/PST schedule ✓ Minimum qualifying marks: 35% in each subject & 50% aggregate
